overview.description: Research department focused on image processing, pattern recognition, and computer vision at the Czech Academy of Sciences
overview.description_long: The Department of Image Processing (ZOI) is a research department within the Institute of Information Theory and Automation (UTIA) of the Czech Academy of Sciences, established in 1985. The department conducts fundamental and applied research in image processing and pattern recognition, with primary application areas including biomedicine, remote sensing, industry, art conservation, astronomy, digital photography, surveillance systems, and image forensics. Research encompasses invariant descriptors, image registration and fusion, theory of moment invariants (rotation, affine, convolution), image restoration (blind deconvolution, denoising, colour transformations), and neural networks—particularly equivariant networks. The department collaborates with academic and industrial partners and provides university education through multiple courses at Czech universities.
overview.tagline: Cutting-edge research in image processing and computer vision

history.origin_story: The department was established in 1985 as part of the Institute of Information Theory and Automation (UTIA) of the Czech Academy of Sciences. It has built a long track record in fundamental image processing research and applied computer vision.

key_milestones.event: Department of Image Processing founded at UTIA, Czech Academy of Sciences
Started EU HORIZON Vigilant project (image forensics / disinformation detection, grant 101073921)
Started H2020 PROVENANCE project (digital content verification, grant 825227)
Hosting ICIP2026 (IEEE International Conference on Image Processing)

financials.parent_company: Institute of Information Theory and Automation (UTIA), Czech Academy of Sciences

partnerships: Czech Academy of Sciences – Strategy AV21 (HOPES AND RISKS OF THE DIGITAL ERA; BREAKTHROUGH TECHNOLOGIES FOR THE FUTURE)
EU HORIZON Vigilant consortium (disinformation / image forensics)
Technology Agency of the Czech Republic (TAČR)

metadata.notes: ZOI (Zpracování obrazové informace) is the Czech abbreviation for this department. The department is part of UTIA (Ústav teorie informace a automatizace) at the Czech Academy of Sciences. Address: Pod Vodárenskou věží 4, Prague 8, Czechia. Phone: +420 286 581 419 / +420 284 680 730. Email: imgproc@utia.cas.cz. The input record categorised this as 'company' but it is an academic research department with ~28 staff (14 research fellows, 1 postdoc, 4 research assistants, 6 PhD students, 3 management/admin). Founded 1985. Employees exact count estimated by counting names on People page.
